title: Ella Hill Country Adventure
shortDescription: Ride the iconic blue train, hike Little Adam's Peak and soak in the misty hills of Ella.
description: Escape into the misty hills of Sri Lanka on this two-day journey through Ella. Ride the world-famous Kandy-to-Ella blue train through endless tea plantations, walk across the legendary Nine Arches Bridge, hike Little Adam's Peak at sunrise, and chase waterfalls in the cool mountain air. A perfect blend of slow travel, soft adventure and breathtaking scenery.

itinerary.details: Pickup from your hotel, scenic train ride to Ella, check in, sunset at Little Adam's Peak.
Sunrise hike, visit Nine Arches Bridge and Ravana Falls, return drop-off.
